original_statement: what is the age difference between the winner and the runner up?
mutated_statement: what is the difference between the one and the other?
mutation_analysis: Pronounization (entity generalization) + Attribute deletion/generalization: Specific role nouns "winner" and "runner up" replaced by vague pronouns "the one" and "the other" (the winner and the runner up → the one and the other) | The explicit attribute "age" is removed, changing "age difference" to generic "difference" (age difference → difference)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 中可识别的关键信息为：“The phrase \"the one and the other\" most logically refers to the winner and the runner-up. The winner (Nagore Robles) is 28 and the runner-up (Raquel Bollo) is 43. The difference in their ages is 43 − 28 = 15”。Agent 直接将变异问题中的模糊代词“the one and the other”解释为明确的角色（winner 和 runner-up），计算并返回具体答案“15”，且没有提出澄清或提及不确定性。由于完全未表达对问题歧义性的意识、未请求更多信息且直接按照自有理解执行计算，符合“无法意识到指令模糊”类别。
